name: Consumer Law Application — collaboration graph smoke
description: Sanity eval for multi-agent graph handoff on an intake task (manual or runner use).

eval_cases.description: User asks for a short plan for complaint documentation.

parts.text: Outline two steps to document a consumer refund delay for escalation.
1) Collect order ID, promise date, and proof of contact. 2) Summarize timeline in 3 bullets for the caseworker.
